visual: "Column +/-" button active. "Items per Column +/-" button dimmed. Arrays with Pictures build area empty.
guide: "Now build by columns first. Make 2 columns of 5."
prompt: "Build 2 columns of 5. Add the columns first."
student_action: Student presses "Column +" 2 times. Each press creates an empty vertical placeholder.
correct_state: 2 empty column placeholders visible. No dots yet.
visual_2: After 2nd press, "Column +/-" dims. "Items per Column +/-" activates.
guide_2: "2 columns. Now add the items in each column. Each "+" puts one dot in every column."
student_action_2: Student presses "Items per Column +" 5 times. Each press fills in one dot per column (2 dots appear each time, forming a horizontal row).
correct_state_2: After 5 presses, complete 5×2 dot array visible (10 dots). "Items per Column +/-" dims.
on_complete: "2 columns of 5. You built it column by column."
visual_3: Equation Builder equation mode. Tile palette: 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, 12.
guide_3: "Now write the equation for 2 columns of 5."
on_correct: "2 times 5 equals 10. Building by columns works the same way. The description matches the expression."
